channel.title: Hello! I am Alaran, Welcome to my Portfolio... on ALARAN IBRAHIM
channel.description: Recent content in Hello! I am Alaran, Welcome to my Portfolio... on ALARAN IBRAHIM

item.title: PROJECT 3(NLP): BUILDING CHAT_BOT FOR CUSTOMERS SERVICE
PROJECT 4 (computer vision) :DIAGNOSIS OF BREAST CANCER WITH ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
item.description: NOTE; The project is aimed at using histological features, CNN and classifiers, currently anatomical features is been used, The page will be updated as soon as the project is completed. Breast cancer is the second most common cancer among women in the United States and the leading cancer type in Nigeria ([Source](https://www.cdc.gov/cancer/breast/statistics/index.htm , Source. However, it can be prevented or managed by early diagnosis. Radiography and Palpation (observation) are the common method in 3rd world countries like Nigeria and other African countires.

item.title: PROJECT 5 (data & web scraping): RAPE NEWS WEB-SCRAPER BOT
item.description: No doubt, the major challenge of data oriented professions in third world countries is lack of a reliable & open-source central database. Nigeria for example is yet to solve this problem fully. However, Data professionals need to collect data on there own, whether by traditional method or data mining. As we all know: DATA IS LIFE WEB SCRAPING PROCESS So what is with RAPE NEWS? Few weeks ago, a friend messaged me that he need a web-scraper for his project, he actually needs to get data on popular sites in Nigeria on rape cases during the lockdown (march - Septemeber 2020).

item.title: PROJECT 2 (analytics): SENTIMENT ANALYSIS OF SHOPRITE on Twitter
item.description: Word-cloud of shoprite-related tweets Sentiment-Analysis INTRODUCTION As the saying goes ‘Customer is King’ , hence it’s paramount to put the client first, and try as much as possible to seek and understand there opinion about a product or service. This project is aimed at analyzing: Tweeps (twitter user’s) emotion about shoprite Most occurring words in tweets Top Tweeps on ShopRite trend table.

item.title: PROJECT 1 (time-series):PREDICTING UNEMPLOYMENT RATE IN OSUN STATE
item.description: Freedom park, Osogbo (2020) This project is aim at solving problems & getting insights indigenous to my country Nigeria, Osun state to be precise. I initially used a linear regression model, but since I am now with more skills, I have choosen to use FbProphet model(Time_series_analysis) Although, there is a challenge of a reliable central data in Nigeria, I was able to scrap data from opendataforafrica.org using pandas library.

item.title: MY INTERNSHIPS (virtual)
item.description: 1) Data Analytics Intern @ QUANTIUM Date:Nov 2020 – Feb 2021 Data Preparation Customer Analytics Experimentation & uplift testing Analytics & Commercial Application Certification 2) Data Analytics virtual @KPMG Date:Dec 2020 – Feb 2021 Data Quality Assessment Data Insights Data Insights and Presentation Certification 3) Data Science and Advanced Analytics @ BCG GAMMA Date: Feb 2021 – March 2021 Business Understanding & Problem Framing Exploratory Data Analysis & Data Cleaning Feature Engineering Modeling & Evaluation Insights & Recommendation Certification

item.title: Skills & Certifications
item.description: SKILLS (End-to-end data science) Problem definition Business Intelligence Insights Presentation Programming language (Python & SQL) Cloud computing (AWS & Google cloud) Data Engineering (Pyspark, ETL(), Pipeline, Parrallel Computing, Airflow, Dask, OLTP, OLAP) Data collection & Web-scraping (Request, Beautifulsoup, Selenium, Scrapy, Tweepy) Data Cleaning & Manipulation (Pandas & Regex…) Data Analysis & Visualization(Tableau, Seaborn, Matplolib, Pandas_profiling, Autoviz…) Database Management ( MySQL & MongoDB) Feature Engineering ( Transformation, PCA, SHAP) Model Building & Evaluation (Sklearn, Keras, h2o, AutoML) Deep Learning, NLP & Computer Vision (OpenCV, NLTK, Google_autoML) Software Enginnering & Model Deployment ( Streamlit, Heroku, Flask & Django) CERTIFICATIONS Data Enginneer with Python –DATACAMP Advanced SQL –KAGGLE University of Machine Learning AWS Machine Learning Explainability –KAGGLE Feature Engineering –KAGGLE Python 3 SOLOLEARN
